_meta.method: Move names come from three sources: name_source=metadata (verbatim from framedata_meta.lua, AUTHORITATIVE); name_source=baston (active-box geometry cross-matched pixel/sequence-exact to a unique ROM pointer against Baston ESN3S, AUTHORITATIVE for st.MP/LK/MK which the meta does not annotate); name_source=inferred (timing/geometry guess, a fallback). Box geometry + timing remain ROM-verified in all cases.

CROUCH_LIGHT_PUNCH.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "1d28e" -- Cr LP  (meta typo; 1d28 is the present pointer)

CROUCH_MEDIUM_KICK.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "2008" -- Cr MK  (corrects prior guess 2008/CrHK)

CROUCH_HEAVY_KICK.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "20d8" -- Cr HK  (corrects prior guess 2008)

HEAVY_PUNCH.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: Target HP "3850" is a proxy to "1818", i.e. 1818 = HP  (corrects prior guess 1e88)

HEAVY_KICK.rationale: framedata_meta.lua GOUKI: "1b08" -- Close HK  (corrects prior guess 1818, which is HP)

MEDIUM_PUNCH.rationale: Baston ESN3S 'Strong' (fd_normals/002) active box [-56,24,18,48] -> PyKuma (32,-66,24,18): pixel-exact, unique match to 14e8 (active=4). Not in framedata_meta.lua.

LIGHT_KICK.rationale: Baston ESN3S 'Short' (fd_normals/014) active box [-72,38,10,14] -> PyKuma (34,-24,38,10): pixel-exact, unique match to 1908 (active=4). Not in framedata_meta.lua.

MEDIUM_KICK.rationale: Baston ESN3S 'Forward' (fd_normals/015) active-box sequence [(36,-78,24,20)+(28,-62,18,14) then (36,-72,20,16)]: frame-by-frame unique match to 1988 (active=5). Corrects prior guess 1dd8. Not in framedata_meta.lua.
